title: Sprint Status
description: Cumulative sprint state tracked by the Orchestrator. Planner injects `verificationCommands` into each new Sprint prompt so prior checks are automatically re-run (regression guard).
x-purpose: Dual-purpose: (1) regression guard via verificationCommands, (2) fuel for Orchestrator re-incarnation via `handoff` field. After a context compaction or fresh session boot, a new Orchestrator reads this file + .vibe/agent/handoff.md to restore state losslessly.

addedVerificationCommands.description: Verification commands introduced by this Sprint that later Sprints must keep green.

verificationCommands.description: Union of all verification commands that must still pass. Planner injects this into each Sprint's 'Regression guard' section.

handoff.description: Orchestrator re-incarnation fuel. Updated at every meaningful checkpoint so a fresh Orchestrator can resume without loss after context compaction or session restart. `handoff.updatedAt` tracks the handoff block only; top-level `stateUpdatedAt` is the authoritative whole-file freshness signal.

lastActionSummary.description: One-line summary of the most recent action completed by the Orchestrator.

openIssues.description: Unresolved blockers or pending user questions.

orchestratorContextBudget.description: Self-assessed context pressure. 'high' means a Planner/Evaluator spawn or re-incarnation is imminent.

preferencesActive.description: Active cross-session preferences that must survive compaction (e.g. 'ko-informal', 'autonomous-until-artifact').

handoffDocPath.description: Path to the narrative handoff file, typically '.vibe/agent/handoff.md'.

updatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp for the last write to the `handoff` block itself.

sandboxNotes.description: Known sandbox-only failures that Orchestrator handles outside the sandbox.

pendingRisks.description: Open risks raised by any Sprint that require action in a future Sprint. Consumed by vibe-sprint-complete (threshold-triggered inserts) and /vibe-review (M8).

lastSprintScope.description: Absolute-to-repo-root file paths touched by the most recently completed Sprint. Populated by vibe-sprint-complete --scope. M3 will derive this from git-staged files; M1 only stores what is passed.

lastSprintScopeGlob.description: Glob summarisation of lastSprintScope (e.g. 'src/lib/**', 'scripts/*.mjs'). Stored verbatim from --scope CLI; derivation algorithm deferred to M3.

sprintsSinceLastAudit.description: Counter incremented on every vibe-sprint-complete passed run. Reset to 0 when an audit-required pendingRisk is resolved (M8). Threshold: .vibe/config.json.audit.everyN (default 5).

stateUpdatedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp set by the last tool that wrote this file (vibe-sprint-complete, migrations, sprint-status.ts helpers). Preflight freshness check uses this as the authoritative signal, replacing handoff.updatedAt vs mtime heuristic.

verifiedAt.description: ISO8601 timestamp set by the Orchestrator after self-QA or Evaluator verdict. Distinct from stateUpdatedAt (which tracks writes) — this tracks verification events.

runOutsideSandbox.description: true if this command requires network/build and must run outside the Generator sandbox

raisedBy.description: Sprint id or tool name that raised this risk

targetSprint.description: Sprint id that should address this, or '*' for any future sprint
